evals.name: happy-path-governance-framework
evals.prompt: Build a data governance framework for our financial services organization
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive governance framework with catalog, ownership model, classification taxonomy, retention policies, and privacy compliance
expectations: Designs data catalog with metadata strategy
Establishes ownership and stewardship model with RACI
Defines classification taxonomy with handling rules
Maps retention policies to regulatory requirements

evals.name: edge-case-data-mesh-transition
evals.prompt: We're moving from centralized to federated data governance in a data mesh
evals.expected_output: Parallel governance models during transition with clear criteria for domain autonomy
expectations: Addresses transition from centralized to federated
Defines global vs local policy boundaries

evals.name: happy-path-pii-classification
evals.prompt: Classify our customer data for GDPR compliance and design handling rules
evals.expected_output: Classification taxonomy with PII detection rules, automated tagging, and handling rules per sensitivity tier
expectations: Defines sensitivity tiers from Public to Highly Restricted
Maps GDPR articles to data elements
Specifies encryption and masking requirements per tier

evals.name: false-positive-data-pipeline
evals.prompt: Design an ETL pipeline to ingest data from Salesforce into our warehouse
evals.expected_output: This skill should NOT be triggered; pipeline design uses data-engineering skill
expectations: Skill is not invoked for pipeline design requests

evals.name: edge-case-merger-acquisition
evals.prompt: We just acquired a company. How do we combine our data governance?
evals.expected_output: Prioritizes asset discovery within 30 days, harmonizes classification and ownership, assigns interim owners
